items.caption: A school entrance with a sign that reads "baguio city montessori school." the school is situated on a street with a crosswalk leading up to the entrance. the building has a pink facade and is surrounded by lush greenery, including trees and shrubs. the sky is overcast, suggesting an overcast day. the architecture of the school is simple and functional, with a welcoming entrance that invites visitors. the surrounding area appears to be a residential neighborhood with a mix of houses and trees.
